title: Server Boostium
description: Set Of Performance Mods To Get Best Experience Out Of Your Server And Making Server Run Multithreaded | ☑️ up to 17x Faster Chunk Generation
body: # 💡About Set of mods that improve performance of the server without breaking vanilla parity. Vanilla os mostly single threaded, this modpack makes it mostly multithreaded # ☑️ Features - asynchronous processing of entities - multithreaded chunk generation - Chunk pregeneration - Memory Optimizations - Issues with packets fixed - 100% faster lighting engine - Faster structure generation - Server Logic Optimized - Performance profiler built-in - Extensive server logic configuration # 📋Mods included: - [Almanac](https://modrinth.com/mod/Gi02250Z) [1\.4\.5] by frikinjay - [Alternate Current](https://modrinth.com/mod/r0v8vy1s) [1\.9\.0] by Space Walker - [Async](https://modrinth.com/mod/vEC2jm6I) [0\.1\.7\+alpha\.4\-1\.21\.6] by Grider, AxalotL, FurryMileon - [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/mod/fALzjamp) [1\.4\.40] by pop4959 - [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/VSNURh3q) [0\.3\.4\+alpha\.0\.42\+1\.21\.6] by RelativityMC, ishland - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH) [0\.127\.1\+1\.21\.6] by FabricMC - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs) [8\.0\.0] by malte0811 - [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/fQEb0iXm) [0\.2\.9] by tuxed - [Let Me Despawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/vE2FN5qn) [1\.5\.1] by frikinjay - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ) [0\.17\.0\+mc1\.21\.6] by JellySquid, 2No2Name - [PacketFixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/c7m1mi73) [3\.1\.0] by TonimatasDEV - [Resourcefulconfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/M1953qlQ) [3\.6\.2] by ThatGravyBoat - [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ps1zyz6x) [0\.1\.4\+fabric\.b88b7b4] by Spottedleaf, ishland - [ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/4WWQxlQP) [1\.5\.13\+1\.21\.6] by Wesley1808 - [Structure Layout Optimizer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ayPU0OHc) [1\.1\.1\+1\.21\.6\-fabric] by TelepathicGrunt - [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/wnEe9KBa) [0\.2\.0\+beta\.7\.200\+1\.21\.6] by ishland - [spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/l6YH9Als) [1\.10\.139] by Luck # 📊 Additional Info - 💬 Join Our **[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/uSzRGWqgn3)** - 📦 Included projects are in version tabs; click the version. - 🌐 All Our Projects Can Be Found On The Organization Page.
